arts.ttl: Liverpool and Everton release a statement ahead of Merseyside derby amid Storm Darragh after Wayne Rooney's Plymouth saw their game called off
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool have addressed concerns their lunchtime kick-off could be at risk due to Storm Darragh, with the clubs releasing a statement ahead of the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Plymouth v Oxford off amid Storm Darragh warnings
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle's Championship match with Oxford United on Saturday is postponed amid severe weather warnings for south west England.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney TV documentary 'could be cancelled' as he fights to save managerial career
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has endured a dreadful first season as Plymouth Argyle manager and a TV documentary focusing on his time at Home Park is now close to being scrapped
